授業方法: Learners who miss tests and do not have an official absence will not have any opportunity to retake the test.-----This course is taught in English. Students should communicate with the teacher in English. Assignments may require the use of a computers and online sites.Additionally, this class includes collaboration and regular pairwork. All members are expected to support each other.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
Each class subject is arranged on the curriculum based on the Diploma Policy (DP) and Curriculum Policy (CP) established by each faculty and graduate school. 
By studying this course with DP/CP in mind, you will develop the abilities expected by each faculty and graduate school. 
The DP, CP, and curriculum table (list of classes, etc.) for each faculty/graduate school are posted in the link below, so please use them as a reference for your study plan. 
https://kwic .kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1 
*Link to kwic (only current students can view)
